mapper.select:
SELECT -- 基础信息 kp.point_id as pointId, kp.point_name as pointName, kp.description, kp.difficulty_level as difficultyLevel, kp.keywords,
-- 答题统计 COALESCE(answer_stats.total_answered, 0) as totalAnswered, COALESCE(answer_stats.correct_count, 0) as correctCount, COALESCE(answer_stats.wrong_count, 0) as wrongCount, COALESCE(answer_stats.accuracy_rate, 0.0) as accuracyRate
FROM knowledge_points kp LEFT JOIN ( SELECT qb.point_id, COUNT(*) as total_answered, SUM(CASE WHEN sa.is_correct = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as correct_count, SUM(CASE WHEN sa.is_correct = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as wrong_count, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN sa.is_correct = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100, 2) as accuracy_rate FROM student_answers sa INNER JOIN question_bank qb ON sa.question_id = qb.question_id WHERE sa.student_id = #{studentId} GROUP BY qb.point_id ) answer_stats ON kp.point_id = answer_stats.point_id
WHERE kp.point_id IN
#{pointId}
ORDER BY accuracyRate ASC
